notes: Children under 12 months are admitted free.
raw: This pass provides admission at half price for op to 4 people (children under 12 months are admitted free). Visit the Boston Children’s Museum website to review museum visitor requirements and any updates to operating hours. The library pass reservation calendar may not reflect changes to museum open dates and hours of operation. Reserve your Melrose Public Library pass for desired date. You will receive a confirmation email with an "Access Pass" link (if you do not have an email account, a printed confirmation may be picked up at the Main Desk of the library). Donated by the Friends of Melrose Public Library.

source_phrases.max_people: half price for op to 4 people
source_phrases.notes: children under 12 months are admitted free
